seedanceSegments.title: Kataifi butter toast hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first kataifi toast in butter, crunch payoff, cool crisp pile.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off scene 1 sizzle with crunch.
seedanceSegments.risk: Under-toasted soggy kataifi or burned bitter edges if toast color drifts.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: butter sizzle; dry crunch rattle; spatula scrape

seedanceSegments.title: Pistachio filling mix and scoop
seedanceSegments.description: Pistachio cream binds kataifi, scoop domes, chill firms balls.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Filling must read crunchy with kataifi shards, not smooth paste.
seedanceSegments.risk: Scale drift on filling balls; model may omit visible kataifi shards.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: thick paste squish; scoop thump; tray slide

seedanceSegments.title: Chocolate marshmallow shell
seedanceSegments.description: Marshmallow melt, cocoa whisk, pour sheet, score six portions.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Chewy shell must stay glossy brown stretch, not baked cookie dough.
seedanceSegments.risk: Grainy seized marshmallow if heat reads too high.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: soft marshmallow sigh; whisk swish; sticky knife drag

seedanceSegments.title: Wrap and roll spheres
seedanceSegments.description: Oiled glove flatten, center filling, pinch wrap, roll six spheres.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Six wrapped spheres; scale carries to finish segments.
seedanceSegments.risk: Hand-cloth fusion risk; filling leak if shell too thin.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: sticky pinch; soft roll; powder puff

seedanceSegments.title: Cocoa dust and cross-section reveal
seedanceSegments.description: Matte cocoa finish, warm knife halve, stretch peel, macro cut face.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for dust and slice macros. Use @CrossSectionDubaiCookieFrame only as the halved cookie topology: matte cocoa shell around vivid green pistachio-kataifi core with golden shards.

Destructive slice allowed here; do not damage cookies in segment-06.

Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.4s: heavy cocoa dust, matte skin;
- 1.4-2.8s: warm knife halves cookie, clean cut;
- 2.8-4.2s: half lifted, shell stretches from green core;
- 4.2-6.0s: macro cut face, kataifi shards visible.

Scale lock: halved cookie diameter 3.5-4 cm; shell 4-5 mm. Negatives: not hollow, not solid green ball without shards.

Global negatives: no bite from whole hero cookies, no text, no music.
seedanceSegments.promptInitial:

seedanceSegments.continuity: Food-porn destructive beat; remaining hero cookies stay intact in next segment.
seedanceSegments.risk: Cross-section may lose kataifi shard detail without reference frame.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: powder whisper; clean slice; crisp shard crackle

seedanceSegments.title: Hero lock intact cookies
seedanceSegments.description: Liners, hero platter, motionless cookies, character satisfaction, FinalDishVisual lock.
seedanceSegments.continuity: N-1 segment: dish intact and motionless for outro handoff.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may add bite or slice if negatives omitted.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: paper crinkle; room tone; soft sigh

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro; Recipe2Video injects prompt, timing, beats, and negatives at sync.
seedanceSegments.continuity: FinalDishVisual matches segment-06 motionless hero lock.
